                           F.lit("unparseable_json").alias("reason")))

    # numeric normalization: strip currency/space/commas, then cast; garbage -> null
    amount_num = (F.regexp_replace(F.trim(F.col(amount_col)), r"[$,\s]", "")
                  .cast("double"))

    parsed_rows = flat.where(F.col("_j").isNotNull()).withColumn("revenue_amt", amount_num)

    # --- expectations: numeric revenue present + merchant key present ---
    valid_pred = F.col("revenue_amt").isNotNull() & F.col(merchant_col).isNotNull()
    valid = parsed_rows.where(valid_pred)
    q_invalid = (parsed_rows.where(~valid_pred)
                 .select(F.col("_raw").alias("raw"),
                         F.lit("invalid_amount_or_merchant").alias("reason")))

    quarantine = q_parse.unionByName(q_invalid)

    # --- UTC event-time normalization (handles epoch s/ms and ISO strings) ---
    if time_col is not None:
        tcol = F.col(time_col)
        is_epoch = tcol.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
        ep = tcol.cast("long")
        event_ts = (F.when(~is_epoch, F.to_timestamp(tcol))
                     .when(F.length(tcol) > 10, F.timestamp_millis(ep))
                     .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(ep)))
    else:
        event_ts = F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
    valid = valid.withColumn("_event_ts", event_ts)

    # --- deterministic dedup on business key (no double counting on replays) ---
    if order_col is not None:
        order_by = [F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last()]
        if seq_col is not None:
            order_by.append(F.col(seq_col).cast("double").desc_nulls_last())
        order_by.append(F.col("_raw").desc())  # fully deterministic final tiebreak
        w = Window.partitionBy(F.col(order_col)).orderBy(*order_by)
        valid = (valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                      .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

    # --- the two views, BOTH from the same clean set so neither loses rows ---
    merchant_totals = (valid
                       .groupBy(F.col(merchant_col).cast("string").alias("merchant_id"))
                       .agg(F.sum("revenue_amt").alias("revenue")))

    cat_expr = (F.coalesce(F.col(category_col).cast("string"), F.lit("UNKNOWN"))
                if category_col is not None else F.lit("UNKNOWN"))
    category_breakdown = (valid
                          .groupBy(cat_expr.alias("category"))
                          .agg(F.sum("revenue_amt").alias("revenue")))

    return merchant_totals, category_breakdown, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    spark = (SparkSession.builder.appName("p4_fanout").getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    merchant_totals, category_breakdown, quarantine = build(spark, input_path)

    # register the non-gold contract tables as TEMP VIEWS (no saveAsTable)
    merchant_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("merchant_totals")
    category_breakdown.createOrReplaceTempView("category_breakdown")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")

    if analyze_only:
        # build + analyze the plan, materialize nothing
        merchant_totals.explain(True)
        category_breakdown.explain(False)
        print("Plan analyzed; no output materialized")
        spark.stop()
        return 0

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        merchant_totals.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        merchant_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p5_mart_customer_segments")
             .getOrCreate())
    # General correctness: pin session tz so any time bucketing is deterministic.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def build_segments(spark, input_path):
    """Build the GOLD customer_segments DataFrame from the CDC feed.

    Strategy:
      - read the NDJSON CDC feed (one change record per line);
      - identify the business key, tier, region, op/delete-flag, and sequence cols;
      - normalize the sequence to a real timestamp (epoch ms/s OR ISO -> UTC);
      - keep only the LATEST record per customer (deterministic dedup);
      - drop customers whose current (latest) record is a delete/removal;
      - count surviving customers by current tier x region.
    """
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = list(raw.columns)

    key_c    = _pick(cols, ["customer_id", "customerId", "cust_id", "id", "customer", "key"])
    tier_c   = _pick(cols, ["tier", "customer_tier", "segment_tier", "cust_tier"])
    region_c = _pick(cols, ["region", "customer_region", "geo", "country", "area"])
    op_c     = _pick(cols, ["op", "operation", "__op", "_change_type", "change_type",
                            "action", "cdc_op", "_op", "eventtype", "event_type"])
    del_c    = _pick(cols, ["__deleted", "is_deleted", "deleted", "_deleted", "removed",
                            "is_removed"])
    seq_c    = _pick(cols, ["sequence", "seq", "ts_ms", "ts_us", "timestamp", "ts",
                            "event_ts", "event_time", "eventtime", "updated_at",
                            "update_ts", "modified_at", "version", "_commit_version",
                            "commit_version", "offset", "lsn", "scn", "_seq"])

    if key_c is None or tier_c is None or region_c is None:
        raise ValueError(
            "Could not locate required columns. "
            f"key={key_c} tier={tier_c} region={region_c} from {cols}"
        )

    df = raw

    # --- normalize the sequence/ordering key to a UTC timestamp ----------------
    if seq_c is not None:
        seq_str = F.col(seq_c).cast("string")
        is_epoch = seq_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
        # epoch in ms if >=13 digits, else seconds.
        epoch_ms = (F.when(F.length(seq_str) >= 13, seq_str.cast("long"))
                     .otherwise(seq_str.cast("long") * F.lit(1000)))
        ord_ts = (F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(epoch_ms))
                   .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(seq_str)))
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_ts", ord_ts).withColumn("_seq_str", seq_str)
        order_cols = [F.col("_ord_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("_seq_str").desc_nulls_last()]
    else:
        # No usable sequence column: fall back to a stable but explicit ordering
        # on the string form of the whole record key fields (deterministic).
        df = df.withColumn("_seq_str", F.col(key_c).cast("string"))
        order_cols = [F.col("_seq_str").desc_nulls_last()]

    # --- deterministic dedup: keep the newest record per customer --------------
    w = Window.partitionBy(F.col(key_c)).orderBy(*order_cols)
    latest = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .drop("_rn"))

    # --- exclude removed/deleted customers (current state is a delete) ---------
    delete_vals = ["d", "delete", "deletes", "deleted", "del",
                   "r", "remove", "removed", "removes"]
    is_delete = F.lit(False)
    if op_c is not None:
        is_delete = is_delete | F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op_c).cast("string"))).isin(delete_vals)
    if del_c is not None:
        is_delete = is_delete | F.lower(F.trim(F.col(del_c).cast("string"))).isin(
            ["true", "1", "t", "yes", "y"])

    current = latest.where(~is_delete)

    # --- final GOLD aggregation: counts by current tier x region ---------------
    seg = (current
           .groupBy(F.col(tier_c).cast("string").alias("tier"),
                    F.col(region_c).cast("string").alias("region"))
           .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).cast("long").alias("n"))
           .select("tier", "region", "n"))
    return seg


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = get_spark()
    seg = build_segments(spark, input_path)

    # Register the contract-named temp view in this SparkSession.
    seg.createOrReplaceTempView("customer_segments")

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing any output.
        seg.explain(mode="formatted")
        print("Plan is valid")
        spark.stop()
        return 0

    if out_path:
        (seg.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path))
    elif out_table:
        (seg.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table))
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output location: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    return None


def _norm_ts(name):
    s = F.col(name).cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = s.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(s) >= 13, F.timestamp_millis(epoch_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_long))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))


def build_segments(spark, input_path):
    # Discover the (messy) CDC schema; read leniently so bad lines don't abort.
    raw = spark.read.option("mode", "PERMISSIVE").json(input_path)

    # If the feed is Debezium-style with nested after/before, flatten to a state row.
    lower = [c.lower() for c in raw.columns]
    if "after" in lower or "before" in lower:
        after = _pick(raw.columns, ["after"])
        before = _pick(raw.columns, ["before"])
        sel = []
        # carry top-level op / ts / seq if present
        for nm in raw.columns:
            if nm.lower() in ("after", "before"):
                continue
            sel.append(F.col(nm))
        # promote payload fields, preferring 'after', else 'before'
        def payload(field):
            a = F.col(after + "." + field) if after else F.lit(None)
            b = F.col(before + "." + field) if before else F.lit(None)
            return F.coalesce(a, b).alias(field)
        for field in ("customer_id", "id", "cust_id", "tier", "region"):
            try:
                sel.append(payload(field))
            except Exception:
                pass
        df = raw.select(*sel)
    else:
        df = raw

    cols = df.columns
    id_col = _pick(cols, ["customer_id", "id", "cust_id", "customerid", "customer", "key"])
    tier_col = _pick(cols, ["tier", "segment", "customer_tier"])
    region_col = _pick(cols, ["region", "geo", "area", "country_region"])
    op_col = _pick(cols, ["op", "operation", "__op", "_op", "cdc_op", "change_type",
                          "_change_type", "action", "event_type", "eventtype"])
    del_col = _pick(cols, ["deleted", "is_deleted", "_deleted", "removed", "is_removed"])
    seq_col = _pick(cols, ["seq", "sequence", "sequence_num", "seqnum", "__seq", "_seq",
                           "offset", "lsn", "version", "_commit_version", "commit_version"])
    ts_col = _pick(cols, ["event_ts", "event_time", "ts_ms", "ts", "timestamp",
                          "updated_at", "modified_at", "_commit_timestamp", "commit_ts",
                          "change_ts", "_ts"])

    if id_col is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not locate a customer-id column in feed: %s" % cols)

    work = df.withColumn("_id", F.col(id_col).cast("string"))
    work = work.withColumn("_tier", F.col(tier_col).cast("string") if tier_col else F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    work = work.withColumn("_region", F.col(region_col).cast("string") if region_col else F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # event-time -> UTC; sequence -> numeric, for deterministic latest-wins
    work = work.withColumn("_event_ts", _norm_ts(ts_col) if ts_col else F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    if seq_col:
        sstr = F.col(seq_col).cast("string")
        work = work.withColumn("_seq", F.when(sstr.rlike("^-?[0-9]+$"),
                                              F.col(seq_col).cast("double")))
    else:
        work = work.withColumn("_seq", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # delete detection
    deleted_pred = F.lit(False)
    if op_col:
        opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op_col).cast("string")))
        deleted_pred = deleted_pred | opl.isin("d", "delete", "deleted", "del",
                                               "r", "remove", "removed", "deletion")
    if del_col:
        dl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(del_col).cast("string")))
        deleted_pred = deleted_pred | dl.isin("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")
    work = work.withColumn("_deleted", deleted_pred)

    # drop rows with no usable customer key
    work = work.where(F.col("_id").isNotNull() & (F.length(F.trim(F.col("_id"))) > 0))

    # Deterministic latest-record-per-customer: event-time, then sequence,
    # then stable tiebreakers so the SAME input always yields the SAME survivor.
    w = Window.partitionBy("_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_deleted").asc(),             # if truly tied, a delete is the terminal state -> prefer it last? keep latest non-amb
        F.col("_tier").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_region").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = (work.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                  .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                  .drop("_rn"))

    # current real state = surviving record that is NOT a delete
    current = latest.where(~F.col("_deleted"))

    result = (current.groupBy(
                    F.col("_tier").alias("tier"),
                    F.col("_region").alias("region"))
                .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).cast("long").alias("n"))
                .select("tier", "region", "n"))
    return result


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p5_mart_customer_segments")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or FALLBACK_INPUT
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    result = build_segments(spark, input_path)

    # register the contract table as a temp view in this session
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customer_segments")

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing any output.
        result.printSchema()
        result.explain(mode="formatted")
        print("Plan valid (analyze-only)")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output target: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"


def pick(cols, *cands):
    """Return the actual column name matching the first candidate (case-insensitive)."""
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in cands:
        if cand.lower() in low:
            return low[cand.lower()]
    return None


def build_segments(spark, input_path):
    # Read the CDC feed. JSON inference resolves type-conflicting fields (e.g.
    # an event-time arriving as epoch-long in some rows and ISO-string in others)
    # to string, which we then normalize explicitly.
    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns

    key    = pick(cols, "customer_id", "customerid", "cust_id", "id", "customer")
    tier   = pick(cols, "tier", "segment_tier", "customer_tier")
    region = pick(cols, "region", "customer_region", "geo")
    op     = pick(cols, "op", "operation", "_change_type", "change_type", "cdc_op",
                  "__op", "event_type", "eventtype", "change", "action")
    ts     = pick(cols, "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "updated_at",
                  "modified_at", "change_ts", "time", "_ts")
    seq    = pick(cols, "seq", "sequence", "sequence_num", "seq_num", "seqnum",
                  "offset", "version", "lsn", "_seq", "scn")
    delflag = pick(cols, "__deleted", "is_deleted", "deleted", "_deleted", "removed")

    if key is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate a customer key column in {cols}")
    if tier is None or region is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate tier/region columns in {cols}")

    # --- UTC-normalized event time (handle epoch + ISO explicitly) ---
    if ts is not None:
        ts_str = F.col(ts).cast("string")
        is_epoch = ts_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
        event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(ts_str.cast("long"))) \
                    .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(ts_str))
    else:
        event_ts = F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
    df = df.withColumn("_event_ts", event_ts)

    # --- deterministic ordering: prefer a monotonic sequence, then event time,
    #     then a content hash so identical-key duplicates resolve identically ---
    order_cols = []
    if seq is not None:
        order_cols.append(F.col(seq).cast("double").desc_nulls_last())
    order_cols.append(F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    order_cols.append(F.to_json(F.struct(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])).desc_nulls_last())

    w = Window.partitionBy(F.col(key)).orderBy(*order_cols)
    latest = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .drop("_rn"))

    # --- exclude customers whose CURRENT (latest) state is a removal ---
    del_cond = F.lit(False)
    if op is not None:
        opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col(op).cast("string")))
        del_cond = del_cond | opl.isin("d", "delete", "deleted", "del",
                                       "r", "remove", "removed", "tombstone")
    if delflag is not None:
        del_cond = del_cond | (F.lower(F.col(delflag).cast("string")).isin("true", "1", "t", "yes"))

    current = latest.where(~del_cond)

    # --- contract: customer_segments(tier, region, n) ---
    result = (current
              .groupBy(F.col(tier).alias("tier"), F.col(region).alias("region"))
              .agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("n"))
              .select("tier", "region", "n"))
    return result


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p5_mart_customer_segments")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    result = build_segments(spark, input_path)

    # Register the contract table as a temp view in this session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("customer_segments")

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan without materializing any output.
        result.explain(True)
        print("Plan is valid (analyze-only)")
        spark.stop()
        return

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "agent_out_p5_mart.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
import shutil
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/p6_dedup_watermark__A2__seed42/silver_orders.parquet"


def get_spark():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p6_dedup_watermark")
             .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def build_stream(spark, input_path):
    """Build the unmaterialized streaming DataFrame for silver_orders."""
    abs_in = os.path.abspath(input_path)
    input_dir = os.path.dirname(abs_in)
    input_file = os.path.basename(abs_in)

    # Read external text first; the file source schema is just `value`.
    raw = (spark.readStream.format("text")
           .option("pathGlobFilter", input_file)
           .load(input_dir))

    # Parse each line to a generic string map so we are robust to messy/extra fields.
    m = F.from_json(F.col("value"), MapType(StringType(), StringType()))
    parsed = raw.withColumn("m", m).where(F.col("m").isNotNull())

    g = lambda k: F.col("m").getItem(k)

    # Event-time: tolerate several field names + mixed epoch(ms/s)/ISO forms, normalize to UTC.
    event_raw = F.coalesce(
        g("event_time"), g("event_ts"), g("ts"), g("timestamp"),
        g("order_ts"), g("created_at"), g("order_time"),
    )
    digits = event_raw.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = (F.when(digits & (F.length(event_raw) >= F.lit(13)),
                       F.timestamp_millis(event_raw.cast("long")))
                 .when(digits,
                       F.timestamp_seconds(event_raw.cast("long")))
                 .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(event_raw)))

    df = (parsed
          .withColumn("order_id", g("order_id"))
          .withColumn("amount", F.coalesce(g("amount"), g("amt")).cast("double"))
          .withColumn("category", F.coalesce(g("category"), g("cat")))
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts))

    # Required key + a usable event-time to keep watermark/state bounded.
    clean = df.where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull() & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull())

    # Bounded, deterministic streaming dedup: exactly one row per order_id,
    # state pruned by the watermark so memory stays bounded as volume grows.
    deduped = (clean
               .withWatermark("event_ts", "24 hours")
               .dropDuplicatesWithinWatermark(["order_id"]))

    return deduped.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    spark = get_spark()
    final = build_stream(spark, input_path)

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & validate the streaming plan WITHOUT materializing anything.
        assert final.isStreaming, "expected a streaming plan"
        _ = final.schema  # force plan analysis only
        print("Plan is valid")
        spark.stop()
        return 0

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        chk = out_path.rstrip("/") + "__chk"
        # Deterministic reruns: clear prior output + checkpoint so reprocessing
        # the same input yields the same materialized result.
        for p in (out_path, chk):
            if os.path.isdir(p):
                shutil.rmtree(p)
            elif os.path.isfile(p):
                os.remove(p)

        q = (final.writeStream
             .format("parquet")
             .outputMode("append")
             .option("path", out_path)
             .option("checkpointLocation", chk)
             .trigger(availableNow=True)
             .start())
        q.awaitTermination()
    else:
        # Table-backed remote fallback.
        chk = "/tmp/p6_dedup_watermark__chk"
        if os.path.isdir(chk):
            shutil.rmtree(chk)
        q = (final.writeStream
             .format("parquet")
             .outputMode("append")
             .option("checkpointLocation", chk)
             .toTable(out_table))
        q.awaitTermination()

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

import os
import sys
import shutil
import tempfile

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)

# All external fields typed as STRING first (validate/normalize, then cast).
# Several candidate event-time keys are included; missing ones resolve to null.
PARSE_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("seq", StringType()),
])


def build_silver(spark, input_path):
    """Build the unmaterialized streaming plan for silver_orders."""
    abs_in = os.path.abspath(input_path)
    input_dir = os.path.dirname(abs_in)
    fname = os.path.basename(abs_in)

    raw = (
        spark.readStream.format("text")
        .option("pathGlobFilter", fname)   # isolate just this seed file
        .load(input_dir)
    )

    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), PARSE_SCHEMA))

    # Main path = parseable rows that carry the business key.
    valid = parsed.where(
        F.col("j").isNotNull() & F.col("j.order_id").isNotNull()
    )

    # UTC-normalized event time: branch epoch-string vs ISO-8601 explicitly.
    et_raw = F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.ts"),
        F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.event_ts"),
    )
    is_epoch = et_raw.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(et_raw.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et_raw))
    # Never let a null event-time silently drop a row from the stateful dedup.
    event_ts = F.coalesce(event_ts, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1970-01-01 00:00:00")))

    enriched = valid.select(
        F.col("j.order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("j.amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("j.category").cast("string").alias("category"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
    )

    # Watermark bounds state; dedup on the explicit business key keeps exactly
    # one row per order (redeliveries are identical, so values are stable).
    deduped = (
        enriched.withWatermark("event_ts", "48 hours")
        .dropDuplicatesWithinWatermark(["order_id"])
    )

    # Contract grain/columns: keyed by order_id carrying amount, category.
    return deduped.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("p6_dedup_watermark")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Pin UTC explicitly (spec deliberately does not pin cluster tz).
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    silver = build_silver(spark, input_path)

    # Register the contract dataset as a temp view in this session.
    try:
        silver.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_orders")
    except Exception:
        pass

    if analyze_only:
        # Build + analyze the plan, materialize nothing.
        assert silver.isStreaming, "expected a streaming plan"
        _ = silver.columns  # forces logical analysis of the plan, no write
        print("Plan valid (analyze-only)")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    # Fresh checkpoint each run => full reprocess => deterministic result.
    chk = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="p6_chk_")

    if out_path:
        # Clear prior output so re-run does not append duplicates.
        if os.path.exists(out_path):
            shutil.rmtree(out_path)
        query = (
            silver.writeStream.format("parquet")
            .option("path", out_path)
            .option("checkpointLocation", chk)
            .outputMode("append")
            .trigger(availableNow=True)
            .start()
        )
        query.awaitTermination()
    elif out_table:
        query = (
            silver.writeStream.format("parquet")
            .option("checkpointLocation", chk)
            .outputMode("append")
            .trigger(availableNow=True)
            .toTable(out_table)
        )
        query.awaitTermination()
    else:
        raise SystemExit("No AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
import shutil
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# All external fields typed as STRING first; validate/cast afterwards (no silent nulls from JSON typing).
RAW_SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("order_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("category", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("seq", T.StringType()),
])


def build_silver(spark, read_path):
    """Build the unresolved streaming plan for silver_orders (one row per order_id)."""
    raw = spark.readStream.format("text").load(read_path)  # column: value

    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), RAW_SCHEMA)).select("j.*")

    # --- UTC-normalized, deterministic event time (epoch ms or ISO-8601) ---
    et_str = F.coalesce(F.col("ts"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("event_ts"))
    is_epoch = et_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(et_str.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et_str))
    # Deterministic fallback so reprocessing never changes the result (no current_timestamp()).
    event_ts = F.coalesce(event_ts, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1970-01-01 00:00:00")))

    df = (parsed
          .where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull() & (F.length(F.trim(F.col("order_id"))) > 0))
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts))

    # --- Watermarked, bounded-state dedup on the business key ---
    deduped = (df.withWatermark("event_ts", "24 hours")
                 .dropDuplicatesWithinWatermark(["order_id"]))

    silver = deduped.select(
        F.col("order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
    )
    return silver


def stage_input(path, workdir):
    """Streaming file source needs a directory; stage a single file into one."""
    if os.path.isdir(path):
        return path
    stage = os.path.join(workdir, "_stream_input")
    os.makedirs(stage, exist_ok=True)
    dst = os.path.join(stage, os.path.basename(path))
    shutil.copyfile(path, dst)
    return stage


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p6_dedup_watermark")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    workdir = os.path.dirname(out_path) if out_path else os.getcwd()

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing anything.
        silver = build_silver(spark, input_path)
        assert silver.isStreaming, "silver_orders must be a streaming plan"
        _ = silver.schema  # force plan analysis; no write, no data movement
        print("Plan is valid")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    read_path = stage_input(input_path, workdir)
    silver = build_silver(spark, read_path)

    checkpoint = os.path.join(workdir, "_chk_silver_orders")

    if out_path:
        # Idempotent re-run: clear prior output + checkpoint so reprocessing == same result.
        shutil.rmtree(out_path, ignore_errors=True)
        shutil.rmtree(checkpoint, ignore_errors=True)
        query = (silver.writeStream
                 .format("parquet")
                 .option("path", out_path)
                 .option("checkpointLocation", checkpoint)
                 .outputMode("append")
                 .trigger(availableNow=True)
                 .start())
        query.awaitTermination()
        # Register the contract table as a temp view in this session too.
        spark.read.parquet(out_path).createOrReplaceTempView("silver_orders")
    elif out_table:
        shutil.rmtree(checkpoint, ignore_errors=True)
        query = (silver.writeStream
                 .option("checkpointLocation", checkpoint)
                 .outputMode("append")
                 .trigger(availableNow=True)
                 .toTable(out_table))
        query.awaitTermination()
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output destination: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""pipeline.py — daily revenue on true (UTC) event day, robust to late-arriving messy mobile order events.

Imperative PySpark. Owns its SparkSession; reads AGENT_INPUT_PATH; writes the gold
contract to AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH (parquet) or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE. Supports --analyze-only.
"""
import os
import sys

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F


# Local fallback dataset for this seed (used only when AGENT_INPUT_PATH is unset).
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/"
    "gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"
)


def get_spark() -> SparkSession:
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("p7_late_data")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Guardrail #3: pin UTC explicitly — the spec deliberately does not pin tz.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def _first_json(value_col, *paths):
    """coalesce over several candidate JSON paths -> first non-null string."""
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(value_col, "$." + p) for p in paths])


def build_gold(spark: SparkSession, input_path: str):
    """Return (gold_df, quarantine_df). Pure transform: no actions, no writes."""
    v = F.col("value")
    raw = spark.read.text(input_path)

    # ---- Extract fields by candidate name (schema-drift tolerant) ----
    extracted = raw.select(
        v.alias("_raw"),
        _first_json(v, "order_id", "orderId", "id", "order").alias("order_id"),
        _first_json(
            v, "amount", "revenue", "total", "price", "amount_usd", "value"
        ).alias("amount_raw"),
        _first_json(
            v,
            "event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "order_time",
            "created_at", "timestamp", "ts", "time",
        ).alias("event_time_raw"),
        # tiebreaker / sequence for deterministic dedup (arrival / version)
        _first_json(
            v,
            "ingest_time", "ingested_at", "sync_time", "received_at",
            "_seq", "seq", "version", "updated_at",
        ).alias("seq_raw"),
    )

    # ---- Guardrail #3: UTC event-time normalization (epoch s/ms OR ISO) ----
    et = F.col("event_time_raw")
    is_epoch = et.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = F.when(
        F.length(et) >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(et.cast("long"))
    ).otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(et.cast("long")))
    event_ts = F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et))

    # sequence timestamp (for tiebreak only); same epoch/ISO branching
    sq = F.col("seq_raw")
    is_epoch_sq = sq.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    seq_ts = F.when(
        is_epoch_sq,
        F.when(
            F.length(sq) >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(sq.cast("long"))
        ).otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(sq.cast("long"))),
    ).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(sq))

    typed = extracted.select(
        "_raw",
        "order_id",
        F.col("amount_raw").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        F.coalesce(seq_ts, event_ts).alias("seq_ts"),
    )

    # ---- Guardrail #4: expectations -> quarantine (nothing lost silently) ----
    valid_pred = (
        F.col("order_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
    )
    clean = typed.where(valid_pred)
    quarantine = typed.where(~valid_pred).select("_raw")

    # ---- Guardrail #2: deterministic dedup on business key ----
    # Keep newest record per order_id; deterministic, input-order independent.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("seq_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    deduped = (
        clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # ---- Aggregate on the TRUE UTC event day ----
    gold = (
        deduped.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))
        .groupBy("event_date")
        .agg(F.sum("amount").alias("revenue"))
        .select(
            F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
            F.col("revenue"),
        )
        .orderBy("event_date")
    )
    return gold, quarantine


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = get_spark()
    try:
        gold, quarantine = build_gold(spark, input_path)

        # Make quarantine observable as a temp view in this session.
        quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")
        gold.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_daily")

        if analyze_only:
            # Build & validate the plan WITHOUT materializing anything.
            gold.explain(mode="formatted")
            print("Plan is valid")
            return 0

        if out_path:
            gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        elif out_table:
            gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        else:
            raise SystemExit(
                "No output target: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE"
            )

        print("Run is COMPLETED")
        return 0
    finally:
        spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T


# ---- contract / IO config -------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"


def get_input_path():
    return os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lower:
            return lower[cand]
    return None


def build_gold(spark, input_path):
    """Build the gold_daily DataFrame from a messy NDJSON order stream.

    Strategy:
      * read raw text + permissive JSON inference (messy upstream, no control)
      * normalize event-time to UTC explicitly (epoch-ms / epoch-s / ISO)
      * derive event_date as the UTC calendar day the order ACTUALLY occurred
        (so late-syncing mobile clients still land on the correct closed day)
      * deterministic dedup per order so reprocessing is stable
      * aggregate revenue per event_date
    """
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    event_col = pick(cols, [
        "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp", "occurred_at",
        "order_time", "ordered_at", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "time",
    ])
    amount_col = pick(cols, [
        "amount", "revenue", "price", "total", "order_amount",
        "order_total", "value", "gross", "sales",
    ])
    id_col = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order", "oid"])
    seq_col = pick(cols, ["sequence", "seq", "version", "updated_at",
                          "ingest_ts", "ingested_at", "sync_time"])

    if event_col is None or amount_col is None:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not locate required columns. cols={cols} "
            f"event_col={event_col} amount_col={amount_col}"
        )

    df = raw

    # --- 3. UTC normalization of event-time --------------------------------
    ts_str = F.col(event_col).cast("string")
    is_epoch = ts_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = ts_str.cast("long")
    # >= 1e11 means it is (at least) milliseconds, not seconds
    event_ts = (
        F.when(is_epoch & (epoch_long >= F.lit(100000000000)),
               F.timestamp_millis(epoch_long))
         .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_long))
         .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(ts_str))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_event_ts", event_ts)

    # session tz is UTC (set in main), so to_date yields the UTC calendar day
    df = df.withColumn("_event_date", F.to_date(F.col("_event_ts")))

    # --- numeric amount: strip currency/whitespace, then cast safely -------
    amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amount_col).cast("string"),
                                 r"[^0-9eE+\-\.]", "")
    df = df.withColumn("_amount", amt_clean.cast("double"))

    # --- expectations: rows must have a valid date AND a valid amount ------
    valid = (
        F.col("_event_ts").isNotNull()
        & F.col("_event_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("_amount").isNotNull()
    )
    clean = df.where(valid)

    # --- 2. deterministic dedup per order ----------------------------------
    if id_col is not None:
        order_cols = [F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last()]
        if seq_col is not None:
            order_cols.append(F.col(seq_col).cast("string").desc_nulls_last())
        order_cols.append(F.col("_amount").desc_nulls_last())
        w = Window.partitionBy(F.col(id_col)).orderBy(*order_cols)
        clean = (clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                       .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                       .drop("_rn"))

    # --- aggregate revenue by the UTC day the order occurred ---------------
    gold = (clean.groupBy(F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"))
                 .agg(F.sum("_amount").alias("revenue"))
                 .select(
                     F.col("event_date").cast(T.DateType()).alias("event_date"),
                     F.col("revenue"),
                 )
                 .orderBy("event_date"))
    return gold


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p7_late_data")
             .getOrCreate())
    # UTC normalization must not depend on cluster default tz
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = get_input_path()
    gold = build_gold(spark, input_path)

    # register the contract-named temp view in this session
    gold.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_daily")

    if analyze_only:
        # build/validate the plan WITHOUT materializing anything
        gold.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        return 0

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No output location: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# candidate upstream field names (feed is not under our control)
ID_KEYS      = ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "order", "txn_id", "transaction_id"]
TIME_KEYS    = ["event_time", "eventTime", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "timestamp",
                "ts", "order_time", "created_at", "sale_time"]
AMOUNT_KEYS  = ["revenue", "amount", "price", "total", "order_total",
                "amount_usd", "value", "gross"]
SEQ_KEYS     = ["ingest_time", "ingested_at", "received_at", "sync_time",
                "updated_at", "version", "seq", "_seq", "load_ts"]


def _first_present(m_col, keys):
    """coalesce over a list of possible map keys -> first non-null string."""
    cols = [m_col.getItem(k) for k in keys]
    return F.coalesce(*cols) if cols else F.lit(None).cast("string")


def _to_utc_ts(s):
    """Normalize a string event time (epoch ms/s OR ISO-8601) to a UTC timestamp."""
    digits = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    ln = F.length(s)
    epoch_ts = (F.when(ln >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
                 .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long"))))
    iso_ts = F.to_timestamp(s)  # parses ISO-8601 (with/without offset)
    return F.when(digits, epoch_ts).otherwise(iso_ts)


def build_gold(spark, input_path):
    raw = spark.read.text(input_path)  # column: value

    parsed = raw.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), MapType(StringType(), StringType())))

    m = F.col("m")
    # quarantine: lines that did not parse as a JSON object at all
    quarantine_parse = parsed.where(m.isNull()).select(F.col("value"))

    obj = parsed.where(m.isNotNull())

    extracted = (obj
        .withColumn("order_id",  _first_present(m, ID_KEYS))
        .withColumn("_t_raw",    _first_present(m, TIME_KEYS))
        .withColumn("_a_raw",    _first_present(m, AMOUNT_KEYS))
        .withColumn("_seq_raw",  _first_present(m, SEQ_KEYS))
    )

    extracted = (extracted
        .withColumn("event_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("_t_raw")))
        # strip currency symbols / whitespace, then cast; quote-wrapped garbage -> null
        .withColumn("amount",
                    F.regexp_replace(F.col("_a_raw"), r"[,$\s]", "").cast("double"))
        # deterministic sequence for dedup tiebreak (arrival/sync order if present)
        .withColumn("_seq_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("_seq_raw")))
    )

    extracted = extracted.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))

    # expectations: required key present, event_date derivable, amount numeric & >= 0
    valid_pred = (F.col("order_id").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("event_date").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
                  & (F.col("amount") >= F.lit(0)))

    clean = extracted.where(valid_pred)
    quarantine_invalid = extracted.where(~valid_pred).select(
        F.col("value"), F.col("order_id"), F.col("_t_raw").alias("raw_time"),
        F.col("_a_raw").alias("raw_amount"))

    # deterministic dedup: one row per order, newest by sync/seq then event_ts
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_seq_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc_nulls_last())
    deduped = (clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                    .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

    # GOLD: revenue per true UTC event calendar day (late rows land on their real day)
    gold = (deduped.groupBy(F.col("event_date"))
                   .agg(F.sum(F.col("amount")).alias("revenue"))
                   .select(F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
                           F.col("revenue"))
                   .orderBy("event_date"))

    quarantine = quarantine_parse.select(F.col("value")).unionByName(
        quarantine_invalid.select(F.col("value")))

    return gold, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p7_late_data")
             .getOrCreate())
    # UTC normalization must not depend on the (deliberately unpinned) cluster default
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path   = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table  = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    gold, quarantine = build_gold(spark, input_path)

    # register contract-named temp views in this session
    gold.createOrReplaceTempView("gold_daily")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")

    if analyze_only:
        # build & validate the plan without materializing anything
        gold.explain(mode="formatted")
        print("Plan is valid")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output location: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/p8_currency_normalize__A2__seed42/usd_daily.parquet"


def first_col(cols, cands):
    for c in cands:
        if c in cols:
            return c
    return None


def to_ts(colname):
    """Normalize a possibly-epoch / possibly-ISO / possibly-date string to a UTC timestamp."""
    c = F.trim(F.col(colname).cast("string"))
    is_epoch = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(c) >= 13, F.timestamp_millis(c.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long")))
    iso_ts = F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(c), F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd"))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(iso_ts)


def build_result(spark, input_path):
    raw = (spark.read
           .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
           .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt")
           .json(input_path))
    cols = raw.columns

    amount_c = first_col(cols, ["amount", "value", "amount_value", "pay_amount",
                                "amount_original", "original_amount", "amt"])
    currency_c = first_col(cols, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "iso_currency"])
    ts_c = first_col(cols, ["occurred_at", "event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "event_ts",
                            "paid_at", "created_at", "time", "datetime", "payment_time"])
    rate_c = first_col(cols, ["rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd",
                              "usd_per_unit", "conversion_rate", "fx"])
    ratedate_c = first_col(cols, ["rate_date", "as_of", "as_of_date", "effective_date",
                                  "fx_date", "date", "day"])
    type_c = first_col(cols, ["type", "kind", "record_type", "event_type", "row_type"])

    # ---- discriminate rate records vs payment records ----
    if type_c is not None:
        is_rate = F.lower(F.col(type_c).cast("string")).rlike("rate|fx|forex|conversion")
    elif rate_c is not None:
        if amount_c is not None:
            is_rate = F.col(rate_c).isNotNull() & F.col(amount_c).isNull()
        else:
            is_rate = F.col(rate_c).isNotNull()
    else:
        is_rate = F.lit(False)

    if amount_c is not None:
        is_pay = F.col(amount_c).isNotNull() & ~is_rate
    else:
        is_pay = ~is_rate

    corrupt = F.col("_corrupt").isNotNull() if "_corrupt" in cols else F.lit(False)

    # ---- FX rate reference table (currency, rate_date, rate) ----
    if rate_c is not None and ratedate_c is not None and currency_c is not None:
        rate_raw = (raw.where(is_rate & ~corrupt)
                    .select(
                        F.upper(F.trim(F.col(currency_c).cast("string"))).alias("currency"),
                        F.to_date(to_ts(ratedate_c)).alias("rate_date"),
                        F.col(rate_c).cast("double").alias("rate"))
                    .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                           & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()
                           & F.col("rate").isNotNull()))
        wr = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_date").orderBy(F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
        rate_df = (rate_raw.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wr))
                   .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))
    else:
        rate_df = spark.createDataFrame([], "currency string, rate_date date, rate double")

    # ---- payments ----
    pay = (raw.where(is_pay & ~corrupt)
           .select(
               F.upper(F.trim(F.col(currency_c).cast("string"))).alias("currency")
               if currency_c else F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("currency"),
               F.col(amount_c).cast("double").alias("amount")
               if amount_c else F.lit(None).cast("double").alias("amount"),
               (to_ts(ts_c) if ts_c else F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("event_ts")))
    pay = pay.withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))

    # recognized currency = present in rate table OR USD
    known = rate_df.select(F.col("currency").alias("k_ccy")).distinct()
    pay = pay.join(F.broadcast(known), pay["currency"] == known["k_ccy"], "left")
    pay = pay.withColumn(
        "recognized",
        F.col("k_ccy").isNotNull() | (F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"))).drop("k_ccy")

    valid = (F.col("recognized")
             & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
             & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
             & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())

    clean = pay.where(valid).drop("recognized")
    quarantine = pay.where(~valid)

    # ---- attach the rate that applied on the payment day (as-of, nearest day, prefer on/before) ----
    clean = clean.withColumn("_pid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    rd = rate_df.select(
        F.col("currency").alias("_rccy"),
        F.col("rate_date").alias("_rdate"),
        F.col("rate").alias("_rrate"))

    j = clean.join(F.broadcast(rd), clean["currency"] == rd["_rccy"], "left")
    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(
        F.abs(F.datediff(F.col("_rdate"), F.col("settlement_date"))).asc_nulls_last(),
        F.when(F.col("_rdate") <= F.col("settlement_date"), F.lit(0)).otherwise(F.lit(1)).asc(),
        F.col("_rdate").desc_nulls_last())
    j = (j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
         .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    usd_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("_rrate"))
    converted = j.withColumn("usd_value", F.col("amount") * usd_rate)

    result = (converted.groupBy("settlement_date")
              .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
              .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                      F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total")))

    return result, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p8_currency_normalize")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    output_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_OUTPUT)

    result, quarantine = build_result(spark, input_path)

    if analyze_only:
        # validate the plan without materializing any output
        result.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    # register required side tables as temp views in this session
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_quarantine")

    (result.coalesce(1)
     .write.mode("overwrite")
     .parquet(output_path))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"


def detect(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    return None


def ev_ts(colname):
    """UTC-normalized event timestamp from epoch(ms/s) or ISO string."""
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    digits = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    ms = F.timestamp_millis(c.cast("long"))
    s = F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long"))
    epoch = F.when(F.length(c) >= 12, ms).otherwise(s)
    return F.when(c.isNull(), None).when(digits, epoch).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c))


def clean_num(colname):
    c = F.regexp_replace(F.col(colname).cast("string"), r"[,$\s]", "")
    # only allow a clean signed decimal; otherwise -> null (quarantine)
    return F.when(c.rlike(r"^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$"), c.cast("double")).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))


def build(spark, input_path):
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    cur_col = detect(cols, ["currency", "ccy", "cur", "currency_code", "curr"])
    amt_col = detect(cols, ["amount", "amt", "value", "payment_amount",
                            "amount_local", "local_amount", "amount_minor"])
    rate_col = detect(cols, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate",
                             "conversion_rate", "fxrate"])
    ts_col = detect(cols, ["event_time", "occurred_at", "ts", "timestamp",
                           "created_at", "time", "payment_time", "event_ts",
                           "paid_at", "datetime"])
    date_col = detect(cols, ["rate_date", "effective_date", "as_of",
                             "as_of_date", "fx_date", "date", "day"])
    id_col = detect(cols, ["id", "payment_id", "event_id", "txn_id",
                           "transaction_id", "pmt_id"])
    type_col = detect(cols, ["type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type"])

    cur_e = F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur_col).cast("string"))) if cur_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    ts_e = ev_ts(ts_col) if ts_col else F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
    amt_e = clean_num(amt_col) if amt_col else F.lit(None).cast("double")

    # --- identify FX-rate records (separate record type) ---
    if rate_col:
        is_rate = F.col(rate_col).isNotNull()
        if amt_col:
            is_rate = is_rate & F.col(amt_col).isNull()
    else:
        is_rate = F.lit(False)
    if type_col:
        is_rate = is_rate | F.lower(F.col(type_col)).isin(
            "rate", "rates", "fx", "fxrate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate")

    rate_count = raw.where(is_rate).count() if rate_col else 0

    # ------- payments base -------
    pay = raw.where(~is_rate) if rate_count > 0 else raw
    pay = pay.select(
        (F.col(id_col).cast("string") if id_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("pid"),
        cur_e.alias("currency"),
        ts_e.alias("ts"),
        amt_e.alias("amount"),
        (F.col(rate_col).cast("double") if rate_col else F.lit(None).cast("double")).alias("row_rate"),
        (F.col(amt_col).cast("string") if amt_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("raw_amount"),
    )

    # deterministic dedup on business key (payment id), newest event wins
    if id_col:
        w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
            F.col("ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last())
        pay = (pay.where(F.col("pid").isNotNull())
                  .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                  .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
               ).unionByName(pay.where(F.col("pid").isNull()))

    pay = pay.withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("ts")))
    pay = pay.withColumn("rk", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    quarantine_rows = []

    if rate_count > 0:
        # ---------- FX-rate-table path ----------
        rdate_src = date_col if date_col else ts_col
        rates = (raw.where(is_rate)
                    .select(F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur_col).cast("string"))).alias("currency"),
                            F.to_date(ev_ts(rate_src)).alias("rate_date"),
                            F.col(rate_col).cast("double").alias("rate"))
                    .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                           & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()
                           & F.col("rate").isNotNull()))
        # dedup one rate per (currency, rate_date), deterministic
        wr = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_date").orderBy(F.col("rate").desc())
        rates = (rates.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wr))
                      .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

        rec_list = [r["currency"] for r in rates.select("currency").distinct().collect()]
        rec_list = sorted(set(rec_list + ["USD"]))

        bad = (F.col("ts").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull()
               | F.col("amount").isNull()
               | (~F.col("currency").isin(rec_list)) | F.col("currency").isNull())

        quarantine = pay.where(bad).withColumn(
            "reason",
            F.when(F.col("currency").isNull() | (~F.col("currency").isin(rec_list)),
                   F.lit("unrecognized_currency"))
             .when(F.col("ts").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull(),
                   F.lit("unparseable_time"))
             .otherwise(F.lit("unparseable_amount")))

        good = pay.where(~bad)

        usd_part = (good.where(F.col("currency") == "USD")
                        .select("settlement_date",
                                F.col("amount").alias("usd_amount")))

        nonusd = good.where(F.col("currency") != "USD")
        cand = nonusd.join(F.broadcast(rates), on="currency", how="left")
        cand = cand.withColumn("elig", F.col("rate_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
        cand = cand.withColumn(
            "gap",
            F.when(F.col("elig"), F.datediff(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("rate_date")))
             .otherwise(F.datediff(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("settlement_date"))))
        wpick = Window.partitionBy("rk").orderBy(
            F.col("elig").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("gap").asc_nulls_last(),
            F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("rate_date").desc_nulls_last())
        picked = (cand.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wpick))
                      .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
        nonusd_part = picked.select(
            "settlement_date", (F.col("amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_amount"))

        converted = usd_part.unionByName(nonusd_part)

    else:
        # ---------- per-payment-rate path ----------
        eff_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("row_rate"))
        pay = pay.withColumn("eff_rate", eff_rate)

        bad = (F.col("ts").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull()
               | F.col("amount").isNull() | F.col("currency").isNull()
               | F.col("eff_rate").isNull())

        quarantine = pay.where(bad).withColumn(
            "reason",
            F.when(F.col("currency").isNull() | F.col("eff_rate").isNull(),
                   F.lit("unrecognized_currency"))
             .when(F.col("ts").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull(),
                   F.lit("unparseable_time"))
             .otherwise(F.lit("unparseable_amount")))

        good = pay.where(~bad)
        converted = good.select(
            "settlement_date",
            (F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate")).alias("usd_amount"))

    usd_daily = (converted.groupBy("settlement_date")
                          .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                          .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                                  F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total"))
                          .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    quarantine = quarantine.select(
        F.col("pid").alias("payment_id"), "currency",
        F.col("raw_amount").alias("amount"), "reason")

    return usd_daily, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p8_currency_normalize")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    usd_daily, quarantine = build(spark, input_path)

    # register contract / side tables as temp views in this session
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")

    if analyze_only:
        # validate the plan without materializing any output
        usd_daily.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "usd_daily.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"


def _to_utc_ts(c):
    """Normalize an event-time string (epoch s/ms or ISO-8601) to a UTC timestamp."""
    is_epoch = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = c.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(c) >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(as_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(as_long))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c))


def build(spark):
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    raw = spark.read.text(input_path)
    parsed = raw.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), MapType(StringType(), StringType())))

    # --- parse failures -> quarantine ---
    parse_fail = (parsed.where(F.col("m").isNull())
                  .select(F.col("value").alias("raw"), F.lit("unparseable_json").alias("reason")))

    ok = parsed.where(F.col("m").isNotNull())

    def g(*keys):
        return F.coalesce(*[F.col("m")[k] for k in keys])

    currency = F.upper(F.trim(g("currency", "ccy", "cur", "curr", "code")))
    amount_s = g("amount", "value", "amt", "foreign_amount", "amount_foreign", "money")
    rate_s   = g("rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "to_usd", "usd_per_unit")
    ts_s     = g("event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "time", "occurred_at", "created_at", "paid_at", "datetime")
    date_s   = g("date", "day", "rate_date", "as_of", "effective_date")

    base = ok.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw"),
        currency.alias("currency"),
        amount_s.alias("amount_s"),
        rate_s.alias("rate_s"),
        ts_s.alias("ts_s"),
        date_s.alias("date_s"),
    )

    # classify: a record is a *rate* record if it carries a rate but NO payment amount.
    is_rate = F.col("rate_s").isNotNull() & F.col("amount_s").isNull()
    is_payment = F.col("amount_s").isNotNull()

    rate_date = F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.col("date_s")), F.to_date(_to_utc_ts(F.col("ts_s"))))
    rates = (base.where(is_rate)
             .select(
                 F.col("currency").alias("rcur"),
                 rate_date.alias("rate_date"),
                 F.col("rate_s").cast("double").alias("rate"))
             .where(F.col("rcur").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull()))

    settlement_date = F.coalesce(F.to_date(_to_utc_ts(F.col("ts_s"))), F.to_date(F.col("date_s")))
    pay = base.where(is_payment).select(
        F.col("raw"),
        F.col("currency"),
        F.col("amount_s").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("rate_s").cast("double").alias("own_rate"),
        settlement_date.alias("settlement_date"),
    )

    # payment-level validity quarantine (bad amount / undatable / missing currency)
    bad_payment = (pay.where(F.col("amount").isNull() | F.col("settlement_date").isNull() | F.col("currency").isNull())
                   .select(F.col("raw"), F.lit("invalid_payment_fields").alias("reason")))

    good = pay.where(F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull())

    # --- resolve the rate that APPLIED on the payment's day (as-of lookup) ---
    pairs = good.select("currency", "settlement_date").distinct()
    rj = pairs.join(rates, pairs["currency"] == rates["rcur"], "left")
    eligible = F.col("rate_date") <= F.col("settlement_date")
    ord1 = F.when(eligible, F.lit(0)).otherwise(F.lit(1))
    sec = F.when(eligible, F.datediff(F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("rate_date"))) \
           .otherwise(F.datediff(F.col("rate_date"), F.col("settlement_date")))
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "settlement_date").orderBy(
            ord1.asc(), sec.asc(), F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
    resolved = (rj.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .select(F.col("currency"), F.col("settlement_date"), F.col("rate").alias("table_rate")))

    pm = good.join(resolved, ["currency", "settlement_date"], "left")
    # USD = identity; else prefer authoritative per-day table rate, fall back to embedded record rate.
    final_rate = F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)) \
                  .otherwise(F.coalesce(F.col("table_rate"), F.col("own_rate")))
    pm = pm.withColumn("final_rate", final_rate)

    # unrecognized currency (no rate anywhere) -> set aside, lose nothing silently
    unrecognized = (pm.where(F.col("final_rate").isNull())
                    .select(F.col("raw"), F.lit("unrecognized_currency").alias("reason")))

    recognized = pm.where(F.col("final_rate").isNotNull()) \
                   .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("final_rate"))

    usd_daily = (recognized.groupBy(F.col("settlement_date"))
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                         F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total")))

    quarantine = parse_fail.unionByName(bad_payment).unionByName(unrecognized)

    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")
    return usd_daily, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p8_currency_normalize")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    usd_daily, quarantine = build(spark)

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & validate the plan without materializing anything.
        usd_daily.printSchema()
        quarantine.printSchema()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEFAULT_INPUT + ".usd_daily.parquet")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"

REV_NAMES = ["revenue", "amount", "total", "sales", "order_total", "gross", "value"]
KEY_NAMES = ["merchant_id", "merchantId", "merchant", "merchant_key", "mid", "merchant_code"]


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    cl = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in cl:
            return cl[cand.lower()]
    return None


def build_plan(spark, input_path):
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # Permissive parse so malformed lines are captured, not silently lost.
    raw = (spark.read
           .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
           .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt_record")
           .json(input_path))

    cols = list(raw.columns)
    rev_col = _pick(cols, REV_NAMES)
    key_col = _pick(cols, KEY_NAMES)
    if rev_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"could not locate a revenue column among {cols}")
    if key_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"could not locate a merchant key column among {cols}")

    has_corrupt = "_corrupt_record" in cols

    # Quarantine unparseable rows (observable loss, kept out of main path).
    if has_corrupt:
        quarantine = raw.where(F.col("_corrupt_record").isNotNull())
        valid = raw.where(F.col("_corrupt_record").isNull())
        quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("quarantine")
    else:
        valid = raw

    # An "order" is any record that carries a revenue value.
    # A "directory" record carries a merchant key but no revenue.
    orders = valid.where(F.col(rev_col).isNotNull())
    dir_rows = valid.where(F.col(rev_col).isNull() & F.col(key_col).isNotNull())

    # Robust numeric revenue (strip currency symbols/commas/whitespace).
    rev_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.col(rev_col).cast("string"), "[^0-9eE.+-]", "")
    rev_num = F.when(rev_clean == "", None).otherwise(rev_clean.cast("double"))
    orders = orders.withColumn("__rev", rev_num)

    # Build deduped directory: exactly one row per merchant key (deterministic),
    # so a duplicated merchant cannot fan out the join and inflate the total.
    attr_cols = [c for c in cols if c not in (rev_col, "_corrupt_record")]
    if key_col not in attr_cols:
        attr_cols = [key_col] + attr_cols
    non_key_attrs = [c for c in attr_cols if c != key_col]

    order_exprs = ([F.col(c).asc_nulls_last() for c in non_key_attrs]
                   if non_key_attrs else [F.lit(1)])
    w = Window.partitionBy(key_col).orderBy(*order_exprs)
    directory = (dir_rows.select(*attr_cols)
                 .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                 .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                 .drop("_rn"))
    # Rename attribute columns to avoid clashing with order columns on join.
    for c in non_key_attrs:
        directory = directory.withColumnRenamed(c, "merch_" + c)

    # LEFT join so EVERY order survives, including merchants not yet in the
    # directory (their attributes come back null) and orders with a null key.
    enriched = orders.join(directory, on=key_col, how="left")
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_orders")

    # Contract output: enriched total ties to source because no order is dropped
    # and the directory cannot fan out.
    enriched_totals = enriched.agg(
        F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("__rev"), F.lit(0.0))).cast("double").alias("revenue")
    )
    return enriched_totals


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("p9_enrich_join")
             .getOrCreate())

    try:
        enriched_totals = build_plan(spark, input_path)
        enriched_totals.createOrReplaceTempView("enriched_totals")

        if analyze_only:
            # Validate the plan without materializing anything.
            _ = enriched_totals.schema
            enriched_totals.explain(True)
            print("Plan is valid")
            return 0

        if out_path:
            enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        elif out_table:
            enriched_totals.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        else:
            raise ValueError("no AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE provided")

        print("Run is COMPLETED")
        return 0
    finally:
        if not analyze_only:
            spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
OUTPUT_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/p9_enrich_join__A2__seed1337/enriched_totals.parquet"

# Broad string-first schema: type everything as STRING, validate/cast later
# (per spark-safety: typing in JSON turns bad values into silent nulls).
PARSE_SCHEMA = (
    "order_id STRING, merchant_id STRING, revenue STRING, amount STRING, "
    "merchant_name STRING, merchant_category STRING, category STRING, "
    "name STRING, record_type STRING, type STRING"
)


def build_enriched_totals(spark):
    """Build the unresolved plan for enriched_totals(revenue). No actions."""
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", INPUT_FALLBACK)

    raw = spark.read.text(input_path)
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), PARSE_SCHEMA))
    rec = parsed.select(F.col("value"), F.col("j.*"))

    # --- Robust numeric revenue parse (strip currency symbols / commas) ---
    rev_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("revenue"), F.col("amount"))
    rev_clean = F.regexp_replace(rev_raw, "[^0-9.\\-]", "")
    rec = rec.withColumn(
        "revenue_num",
        F.when((rev_raw.isNull()) | (rev_clean == ""), None).otherwise(rev_clean.cast("double")),
    )

    # --- Classify record kinds ---
    has_revenue = F.col("revenue").isNotNull() | F.col("amount").isNotNull()
    is_order = F.col("order_id").isNotNull() | has_revenue
    has_merch_attr = (
        F.col("merchant_name").isNotNull()
        | F.col("merchant_category").isNotNull()
        | F.col("category").isNotNull()
    )
    is_dir = has_merch_attr & (~has_revenue)

    orders = rec.where(is_order)

    # --- Merchant directory: deterministic dedup on merchant_id ---
    # Prevents join fan-out that would INFLATE the enriched total.
    directory_all = rec.where(is_dir & F.col("merchant_id").isNotNull()).select(
        F.col("merchant_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("merchant_name"), F.col("name")).alias("merchant_name"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("merchant_category"), F.col("category")).alias("merchant_category"),
        F.col("value").alias("_dir_src"),
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("merchant_id").orderBy(F.col("_dir_src").desc_nulls_last())
    directory = (
        directory_all.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn", "_dir_src")
    )
