        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    if out_path:
        gold.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        gold.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "settlement_daily.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/p14_fx_settlement__A2__seed1337/settlement_daily.parquet"

# Wide, all-string schema: from_json yields null for absent fields (safe),
# and we never let the JSON parser silently coerce types (esp. timestamps).
_FIELDS = [
    "type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type", "source", "feed",
    "txn_id", "payment_id", "event_id", "id", "settlement_id",
    "currency", "ccy", "curr",
    "amount", "value", "settled_amount", "usd_amount", "usd_total", "amount_usd", "settled_usd",
    "rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd",
    "event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "settled_at", "time",
    "date", "settlement_date", "rate_date", "effective_date", "day", "as_of",
    "seq", "version", "updated_at",
]
SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(f, T.StringType(), True) for f in _FIELDS])


def _coalesce(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


def _to_utc_ts(c):
    """Normalize epoch (s or ms) and ISO-8601 strings to a UTC timestamp."""
    is_epoch = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    return (F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(c) >= F.lit(13)), F.timestamp_millis(c.cast("long")))
             .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long")))
             .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c)))


def _num(c):
    """Gentle clean (strip commas/whitespace) then cast; garbage -> null."""
    return F.regexp_replace(F.trim(c), ",", "").cast("double")


def build(spark, input_path):
    raw = spark.read.text(input_path).withColumnRenamed("value", "_raw")
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("_raw"), SCHEMA))

    quarantine_unparseable = parsed.where(F.col("j").isNull()).select(F.col("_raw"))
    rows = parsed.where(F.col("j").isNotNull()).select("_raw", "j.*")

    rec_type = F.lower(F.coalesce(_coalesce("type", "record_type", "kind", "event_type"), F.lit("")))
    src = F.lower(F.coalesce(_coalesce("source", "feed"), F.lit("")))

    df = rows.withColumn("_rt", rec_type).withColumn("_src", src)

    has_rate = (F.col("rate").isNotNull() | F.col("fx_rate").isNotNull()
                | F.col("usd_rate").isNotNull() | F.col("rate_to_usd").isNotNull())
    is_rate = F.col("_rt").rlike("rate|^fx$|fx_") | has_rate
    is_bank = (F.col("_rt").rlike("settle|bank|external|recon")
               | F.col("_src").rlike("bank|external"))

    # ---------------- FX RATES (currency, date) -> rate (USD per 1 unit) ----------------
    rates = (df.where(is_rate)
             .withColumn("rate_currency", F.upper(F.trim(_coalesce("currency", "ccy", "curr"))))
             .withColumn("rate", _num(_coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd")))
             .withColumn("rate_date",
                         F.to_date(_to_utc_ts(_coalesce("rate_date", "effective_date", "date", "day", "as_of"))))
             .where(F.col("rate_currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("rate_date").isNotNull()))
    # one rate per (currency, rate_date), deterministic survivor
    wr = Window.partitionBy("rate_currency", "rate_date").orderBy(F.col("_raw").desc())
    rates = (rates.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wr)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
             .select("rate_currency", "rate_date", "rate"))

    # ---------------- PAYMENTS ----------------
    pay = (df.where(~is_rate & ~is_bank)
           .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(_coalesce("currency", "ccy", "curr"))))
           .withColumn("amt", _num(_coalesce("amount", "value", "settled_amount")))
           .withColumn("event_ts",
                       _to_utc_ts(_coalesce("event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                                            "settled_at", "time", "date", "day")))
           .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))
           .withColumn("txn_key", F.coalesce(_coalesce("txn_id", "payment_id", "event_id",
                                                       "id", "settlement_id"), F.col("_raw"))))

    valid_pred = (F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("amt").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
    quarantine_payments = pay.where(~valid_pred).select(F.col("_raw"))
    pay_ok = pay.where(valid_pred)

    # deterministic dedup: latest event_ts, tiebreak by raw text (null txn_key keyed by raw -> unique)
    wd = Window.partitionBy("txn_key").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc())
    pay_dedup = (pay_ok.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wd)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                 .select("settlement_date", "currency", "amt"))

    # native-currency daily totals
    ccy_native = (pay_dedup.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
                  .agg(F.sum("amt").alias("native_amount")))

    # effective rate = latest rate on or before settlement_date (USD passes through at 1.0)
    cand = (ccy_native.alias("c")
            .join(rates.alias("r"),
                  (F.col("c.currency") == F.col("r.rate_currency"))
                  & (F.col("r.rate_date") <= F.col("c.settlement_date")), "left"))
    we = Window.partitionBy("c.settlement_date", "c.currency").orderBy(F.col("r.rate_date").desc_nulls_last())
    eff = (cand.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(we)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
           .select(F.col("c.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"),
                   F.col("c.currency").alias("currency"),
                   F.col("c.native_amount").alias("native_amount"),
                   F.col("r.rate").alias("eff_rate")))

    eff = eff.withColumn("rate_used",
                         F.when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("eff_rate")))
    by_ccy = eff.withColumn("usd_amount",
                            F.round(F.col("native_amount") * F.col("rate_used"), 2)) \
                .select("settlement_date", "currency", "native_amount", "rate_used", "usd_amount") \
                .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency")

    # daily USD totals (the GOLD contract output)
    daily = (by_ccy.groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_amount"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
             .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
             .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    # ---------------- EXTERNAL BANK SETTLEMENTS FEED ----------------
    bank = (df.where(is_bank & ~is_rate)
            .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(_coalesce("currency", "ccy", "curr"))))
            .withColumn("bank_usd", _num(_coalesce("usd_amount", "usd_total", "amount_usd",
                                                   "settled_usd", "settled_amount", "amount", "value")))
            .withColumn("settlement_date",
                        F.to_date(_to_utc_ts(_coalesce("settlement_date", "date", "settled_at",
                                                       "day", "timestamp", "ts"))))
            .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("bank_usd").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull())
            .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
            .agg(F.round(F.sum("bank_usd"), 2).alias("bank_usd")))

    # ---------------- RECONCILIATION (line by line, per day per currency) ----------------
    recon = (by_ccy.select("settlement_date", "currency", F.col("usd_amount").alias("our_usd"))
             .join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer"))
    diff = (F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd"), F.lit(0.0)) - F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0)))
    recon = (recon.withColumn("diff", F.round(diff, 2))
             .withColumn("status",
                         F.when(F.col("our_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_OURS"))
                          .when(F.col("bank_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_IN_BANK"))
                          .when(F.abs(F.col("diff")) <= F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
                          .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH")))
             .select("settlement_date", "currency", "our_usd", "bank_usd", "diff", "status")
             .orderBy("settlement_date", "currency"))

    return {
        "settlement_daily": daily,
        "settlement_by_currency": by_ccy,
        "settlement_reconciliation": recon,
        "quarantine": quarantine_unparseable.unionByName(quarantine_payments),
    }


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if not out_path and not out_table:
        out_path = DEFAULT_OUTPUT

    spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("p14_fx_settlement").getOrCreate()
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    outs = build(spark, input_path)

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing anything.
        for name, df in outs.items():
            df.printSchema()
            df.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    # register contract-required tables as TEMP VIEWS in this session
    outs["settlement_daily"].createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_daily")
    outs["settlement_by_currency"].createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_by_currency")
    outs["settlement_reconciliation"].createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_reconciliation")
    outs["quarantine"].createOrReplaceTempView("settlement_quarantine")

    # write the GOLD output
    if out_path:
        outs["settlement_daily"].write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    else:
        outs["settlement_daily"].write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

notes: PER_CELL_TIMEOUT: cell exceeded the 600s hard per-cell wall-clock cap and was abandoned; in-process Spark JVM force-killed and the sweep advanced (per-iteration exec budget AGENT_EXEC_TIMEOUT_S=150s).

final_program:
"""pipeline.py -- idempotent keyed upsert for the messy `orders` feed.

Contract: table `silver_orders` keyed by `order_id` carrying `amount, category`,
exactly one row per `order_id`, stable across re-runs (re-reading overlapping
batches must NOT change a correct result).

Strategy:
  * Read NDJSON defensively (every field as string first; cast deliberately).
  * Normalize a per-record event-time / sequence so we can pick THE real row
    for each order_id deterministically (newest wins, deterministic tiebreak).
  * Collapse to exactly one row per order_id.
  * Write with overwrite semantics so reprocessing the same input yields the
    identical materialized output (idempotent re-run).
"""

import os
import sys

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T


DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_merge_upsert_silver_orders")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Deterministic time bucketing regardless of cluster default tz.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def _pick(cols, candidates):
    """Return the first candidate present in cols (case-insensitive), else None."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def _to_str(colname):
    """Coerce a possibly-nested/typed json column to a clean string column."""
    return F.col(colname).cast("string")


def _norm_event_ts(colname):
    """Normalize a mixed-format event-time column to a UTC timestamp.

    Handles epoch-seconds, epoch-millis, and ISO-8601 string forms explicitly
    instead of trusting a single parser (mixed forms otherwise misbucket)."""
    raw = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    is_epoch = raw.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    # >=13 digits => milliseconds, otherwise treat as seconds.
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(raw) >= F.lit(13),
                      F.timestamp_millis(raw.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(raw.cast("long")))
    iso_ts = F.to_timestamp(raw)
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(iso_ts)


def build_silver(spark, input_path):
    # Read every field as string first (typing in a json schema turns bad
    # values into silent nulls -- we validate/cast deliberately instead).
    raw_text = spark.read.text(input_path)
    # Infer the available field names cheaply via json read, then re-read as
    # strings so casting is under our control.
    probe = spark.read.json(input_path)
    field_names = probe.columns

    # Build an all-string schema so nothing is coerced behind our back.
    string_schema = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType(), True)
                                  for n in field_names])
    parsed = raw_text.withColumn("_j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), string_schema))

    # Drop rows that did not parse at all (cannot contribute a real order).
    parsed = parsed.where(F.col("_j").isNotNull())
    df = parsed.select("_j.*")
    cols = df.columns

    # --- Identify contract columns -----------------------------------------
    key_col = _pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order"])
    amount_col = _pick(cols, ["amount", "amt", "total", "order_amount", "value_amount"])
    category_col = _pick(cols, ["category", "cat", "order_category", "type"])

    if key_col is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate order_id key among columns: {cols}")

    # Clean amount: strip currency/grouping junk, then cast.
    if amount_col is not None:
        amount_clean = F.regexp_replace(_to_str(amount_col), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
        amount_expr = F.when(amount_clean == F.lit(""), F.lit(None)) \
                       .otherwise(amount_clean.cast("double"))
    else:
        amount_expr = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    category_expr = _to_str(category_col) if category_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    key_expr = _to_str(key_col)

    # --- Identify a deterministic sequence / event-time for "newest wins" ---
    seq_col = _pick(cols, ["seq", "sequence", "version", "_seq", "offset", "rev", "batch_seq"])
    time_col = _pick(cols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "updated_at", "update_ts",
                            "order_time", "created_at", "ts", "timestamp", "ingest_ts"])

    order_by = []
    if time_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_event_ts", _norm_event_ts(time_col))
        order_by.append(F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    if seq_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_seq", _to_str(seq_col).cast("double"))
        order_by.append(F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last())

    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", key_expr)
          .withColumn("amount", amount_expr)
          .withColumn("category", category_expr))

    # Require a present key.
    df = df.where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull() & (F.length(F.trim(F.col("order_id"))) > 0))

    # Final deterministic tiebreakers so the SAME input always yields the SAME
    # survivor (and thus the same materialized output on re-run).
    order_by += [
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
    ]

    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(*order_by)
    deduped = (df
               .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
               .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
               .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))

    return deduped


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = get_spark()
    try:
        silver = build_silver(spark, input_path)

        if analyze_only:
            # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing.
            silver.explain(mode="formatted")
            print("Plan is valid")
            return 0

        # Register the contract-named temp view in this session.
        silver.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_orders")

        # Overwrite => reprocessing the same input does not change the result.
        if out_path:
            silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        elif out_table:
            silver.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        else:
            raise ValueError("No output location: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

        print("Run is COMPLETED")
        return 0
    finally:
        spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

"""
pipeline.py -- imperative PySpark transform for the `new_merge_upsert` ticket.

Goal: re-runnable nightly load over an `orders` feed that replays overlapping
batches. Produce `silver_orders` keyed by order_id carrying (amount, category)
with EXACTLY ONE row per order_id, reflecting the order's real (latest) values,
and STABLE across re-runs (idempotent upsert via deterministic dedup + overwrite).
"""

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/"
    "_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)

# Candidate columns (in priority order) that act as an explicit sequence key,
# letting us pick the *newest* version of a replayed order deterministically.
SEQ_CANDIDATES = [
    "event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp", "updated_at", "update_time",
    "modified_at", "last_modified", "timestamp", "ts", "ingest_time",
    "ingested_at", "load_ts", "seq", "sequence", "version", "_version",
    "offset", "row_seq", "batch_seq", "batch_id",
]


def get_spark():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_merge_upsert")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # Pin UTC explicitly (the spec deliberately does not pin the cluster default).
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def _to_utc_ordering(colname):
    """Normalize a sequence/event-time column to a single comparable timestamp.

    Handles epoch (s / ms) strings and ISO-8601 strings; pure-integer version
    numbers remain monotonic under this mapping so ordering is preserved.
    """
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    is_epoch = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = F.when(
        F.length(c) >= F.lit(12),
        F.timestamp_millis(c.cast("long")),
    ).otherwise(
        F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long"))
    )
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c))


def build_silver(spark, input_path):
    """Build the deduplicated silver_orders DataFrame (no write)."""
    # Parse generically. PERMISSIVE inference keeps epoch/ISO timestamps and
    # quote-wrapped numbers as strings (we validate + cast ourselves), and
    # routes unparseable lines into _corrupt_record (-> quarantine).
    parsed = spark.read.option("mode", "PERMISSIVE").json(input_path)

    cols = list(parsed.columns)

    # Guarantee the contract-required columns exist even if absent upstream,
    # so missing-key rows fall to quarantine rather than crashing the plan.
    for required in ("order_id", "amount", "category"):
        if required not in cols:
            parsed = parsed.withColumn(required, F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    cols = list(parsed.columns)

    # ---- Validation / expectations ------------------------------------------
    amount_d = F.col("amount").cast("double")
    order_key_present = F.col("order_id").isNotNull()
    amount_valid = amount_d.isNotNull()           # quote-wrapped/garbage -> null
    is_valid = order_key_present & amount_valid

    # Quarantine: nothing vanishes silently.
    quarantine = parsed.where(~is_valid)
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("orders_quarantine")

    clean = parsed.where(is_valid).withColumn("amount", amount_d)

    # ---- Deterministic sequence key for newest-wins upsert -------------------
    seq_col = next((cnd for cnd in SEQ_CANDIDATES if cnd in cols), None)

    # Stable tiebreaker: full-row content as JSON. Guarantees that the SAME
    # input always yields the SAME survivor (idempotency), and that exact
    # duplicate replays collapse to one row regardless of arrival order.
    content_cols = [c for c in clean.columns]
    row_fingerprint = F.to_json(F.struct(*[F.col(c) for c in content_cols]))
    clean = clean.withColumn("_rowjson", row_fingerprint)

    if seq_col is not None:
        clean = clean.withColumn("_seq_ts", _to_utc_ordering(seq_col))
        order_spec = [F.col("_seq_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_rowjson").desc()]
    else:
        # No sequence available: pick deterministically by content only.
        order_spec = [F.col("_rowjson").desc()]

    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(*order_spec)
    deduped = (
        clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    )

    # ---- Contract projection: exactly (order_id, amount, category) -----------
    silver = deduped.select(
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
    )
    return silver


def main(argv):
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in argv

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    spark = get_spark()
    try:
        silver = build_silver(spark, input_path)
        silver.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_orders")

        if analyze_only:
            # Build & analyze the plan only; no materialization, no write.
            silver.explain(True)
            print("Plan is VALID")
            return 0

        # Idempotent write: overwrite ensures replays never grow the table and
        # the deterministic dedup guarantees the same correct result every run.
        if out_path:
            silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        elif out_table:
            silver.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        else:
            silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
                os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "silver_orders.parquet")
            )

        print("Run is COMPLETED")
        return 0
    finally:
        spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main(sys.argv[1:]))

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

TS_CANDIDATES  = ["event_time", "event_ts", "eventtime", "updated_at", "update_ts",
                  "ts", "timestamp", "created_at", "load_time", "ingest_ts", "_ts"]
SEQ_CANDIDATES = ["seq", "sequence", "version", "row_version", "_seq",
                  "offset", "batch_id", "batch", "rev"]


def get_spark():
    return (SparkSession.builder
            .appName("new_merge_upsert")
            .getOrCreate())


def _first_present(candidates, cols):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def _norm_ts(colname):
    """Normalize a possibly epoch / possibly ISO timestamp string to UTC timestamp."""
    c = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    is_epoch = c.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    return (F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(c) <= 10), F.timestamp_seconds(c.cast("long")))
             .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_millis(c.cast("long")))
             .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(c)))


def build_silver(spark, input_path):
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # Parse the messy NDJSON. Permissive so structurally-bad lines surface as
    # _corrupt_record rather than killing the job.
    df = spark.read.option("mode", "PERMISSIVE").json(input_path)
    cols = df.columns

    if "_corrupt_record" in cols:
        df = df.where(F.col("_corrupt_record").isNull())

    # Required key — rows without an order_id cannot be keyed; exclude them.
    df = df.where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull() &
                  (F.trim(F.col("order_id").cast("string")) != ""))

    # Clean amount: strip currency symbols / grouping commas / stray quotes,
    # then cast to double.
    amount_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.col("amount").cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    amount_col = F.when(amount_clean == "", None).otherwise(amount_clean).cast("double")

    category_col = F.col("category").cast("string")

    df = (df.withColumn("_amount", amount_col)
            .withColumn("_category", category_col))

    # Deterministic "latest wins" ordering for the upsert/dedup.
    order_by = []
    ts_col = _first_present(TS_CANDIDATES, cols)
    if ts_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_event_ts", _norm_ts(ts_col))
        order_by.append(F.col("_event_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    seq_col = _first_present(SEQ_CANDIDATES, cols)
    if seq_col is not None:
        order_by.append(F.col(seq_col).cast("double").desc_nulls_last())

    # Fully deterministic tiebreakers so identical input always yields the
    # identical survivor (idempotent re-runs).
    order_by += [F.col("_amount").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("_category").asc_nulls_last()]

    w = Window.partitionBy(F.col("order_id")).orderBy(*order_by)

    silver = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .select(F.col("order_id"),
                        F.col("_amount").alias("amount"),
                        F.col("_category").alias("category")))
    return silver


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = get_spark()
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)

    silver = build_silver(spark, input_path)
    # Register the contract-named view in this session.
    silver.createOrReplaceTempView("silver_orders")

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing.
        silver.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        # overwrite => re-running on the same input reproduces the same output;
        # no row growth, no creeping totals.
        silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        silver.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise SystemExit("No output location: set AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH or AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

# ----- dataset locations (env overrides win; fall back to seed paths) -----
PRIMARY_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed42.ndjson"
FX_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed42.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("usd_daily_pit_join")
             .getOrCreate())
    # Deterministic time-bucketing: never trust the cluster default tz.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def pick(df, candidates):
    """Return the real column name matching the first candidate (case-insensitive)."""
    cols = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in cols:
            return cols[cand.lower()]
    return None


def norm_ts(col):
    """Normalize a string event-time to a UTC timestamp.
    Handles epoch-seconds, epoch-millis, and ISO-8601 strings explicitly."""
    s = col.cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(s) >= 13, F.timestamp_millis(as_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(as_long))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))


def build(spark):
    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", PRIMARY_FALLBACK)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_FX_PATH",
                             os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", FX_FALLBACK))

    # ---- read raw (json infers types; we re-cast ts/amount to string and
    #      validate/normalize ourselves rather than trusting one parser) ----
    pay_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---- resolve columns defensively ----
    p_id = pick(pay_raw, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "pay_id"])
    p_amt = pick(pay_raw, ["amount", "value", "foreign_amount", "amount_foreign",
                           "fx_amount", "amt", "foreign_value"])
    p_ccy = pick(pay_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "iso_currency"])
    p_ts = pick(pay_raw, ["timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "ts", "occurred_at",
                          "payment_time", "created_at", "payment_ts", "time"])

    r_rate = pick(fx_raw, ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "rate_to_usd",
                           "usd_rate", "price", "rate_usd"])
    r_ccy = pick(fx_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "iso_currency"])
    r_ts = pick(fx_raw, ["effective_time", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "timestamp",
                         "event_time", "event_ts", "ts", "rate_time", "as_of", "time"])
    r_seq = pick(fx_raw, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "_seq", "version", "commit_ts",
                          "lsn", "change_seq", "_commit_version"])
    r_op = pick(fx_raw, ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "cdc_op", "_change_type"])

    # ---------- payments: normalize, validate, dedup ----------
    p = (pay_raw
         .withColumn("payment_id", F.col(p_id).cast("string") if p_id else F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
         .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
         .withColumn("foreign_amount", F.col(p_amt).cast("double"))
         .withColumn("payment_ts", norm_ts(F.col(p_ts))))

    p_valid = p.where(
        F.col("currency").isNotNull() & (F.col("currency") != "") &
        F.col("foreign_amount").isNotNull() &
        F.col("payment_ts").isNotNull()
    )
    pay_quarantine = p.where(
        F.col("currency").isNull() | (F.col("currency") == "") |
        F.col("foreign_amount").isNull() |
        F.col("payment_ts").isNull()
    )

    # dedup duplicate payment events deterministically (newest wins)
    pw = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(
        F.col("payment_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("foreign_amount").desc_nulls_last())
    p_dedup = (p_valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(pw))
               .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
               .select("payment_id", "currency", "foreign_amount", "payment_ts"))

    # ---------- fx rates CDC: normalize, dedup on (currency, rate_ts) ----------
    r = (fx_raw
         .withColumn("rate_currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(r_ccy).cast("string"))))
         .withColumn("rate", F.col(r_rate).cast("double"))
         .withColumn("rate_ts", norm_ts(F.col(r_ts))))
    if r_seq:
        r = r.withColumn("_seq", F.col(r_seq).cast("string"))
    else:
        r = r.withColumn("_seq", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    # treat deletes (if a CDC op exists) as non-applicable rate state
    if r_op:
        r = r.where(~F.lower(F.col(r_op).cast("string")).isin("d", "delete", "del"))

    r_valid = r.where(
        F.col("rate_currency").isNotNull() & (F.col("rate_currency") != "") &
        F.col("rate").isNotNull() & (F.col("rate") > 0) &
        F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull()
    )

    # one authoritative rate per (currency, effective timestamp): break ties on seq
    rw = Window.partitionBy("rate_currency", "rate_ts").orderBy(
        F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
    r_dedup = (r_valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(rw))
               .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
               .select("rate_currency", "rate", "rate_ts"))

    # ---------- point-in-time (as-of) join ----------
    # candidate rates = same currency AND effective at-or-before the payment moment
    cond = (p_dedup.currency == r_dedup.rate_currency) & \
           (r_dedup.rate_ts <= p_dedup.payment_ts)
    joined = p_dedup.join(r_dedup, cond, "left")

    # pick the latest rate that was in effect (never one stamped after the payment)
    aw = Window.partitionBy("payment_id").orderBy(
        F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last())
    asof = (joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(aw))
            .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

    # payments with NO in-effect rate cannot be converted -> quarantine (not dropped silently)
    enriched = asof.where(F.col("rate").isNotNull()) \
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("rate")) \
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("payment_ts"))) \
        .withColumnRenamed("rate_ts", "applied_rate_ts") \
        .select("payment_id", "currency", "foreign_amount",
                F.col("rate").alias("applied_rate"),
                "applied_rate_ts", "usd_amount",
                "payment_ts", "settlement_date")

    no_rate_quarantine = asof.where(F.col("rate").isNull()) \
        .select("payment_id", "currency", "foreign_amount", "payment_ts")

    # ---------- gold: USD per UTC calendar day ----------
    usd_daily = (enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                         F.col("usd_total"))
                 .orderBy("settlement_date"))

    return usd_daily, enriched, pay_quarantine, no_rate_quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    spark = get_spark()

    usd_daily, enriched, pay_q, rate_q = build(spark)

    # register contract-required side tables as temp views in this session
    enriched.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_usd")          # enriched per-payment w/ applied rate ts
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    pay_q.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_quarantine")
    rate_q.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_no_rate_quarantine")

    if analyze_only:
        # build & validate the plan without materializing anything
        usd_daily.explain(mode="formatted")
        enriched.explain(mode="formatted")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
            os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "usd_daily.parquet"))

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F


# ---------- helpers --------------------------------------------------------
def detect_col(cols, candidates, required=True, what=""):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in candidates:
        for c in cols:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    if required:
        raise ValueError("Could not detect column for %s among %s" % (what, cols))
    return None


def to_utc_ts(colname):
    """Normalize an event-time column (epoch millis/seconds or ISO string) -> UTC timestamp."""
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    return (
        F.when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{11,}$"), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
         .when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{1,10}$"), F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
         .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))
    )


def num(colname):
    return F.col(colname).cast("string").cast("double")


# ---------- pipeline -------------------------------------------------------
def build(spark):
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    payments_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
        "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson",
    )

    # ---- read payments ----
    pay_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    pc = pay_raw.columns
    p_id = detect_col(pc, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id"], what="payment id")
    p_ccy = detect_col(pc, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr"], what="payment currency")
    p_amt = detect_col(
        pc,
        ["foreign_amount", "amount_foreign", "amount", "value", "payment_amount", "fx_amount"],
        what="payment amount",
    )
    p_ts = detect_col(
        pc,
        ["event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "payment_time", "payment_ts",
         "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "time"],
        what="payment timestamp",
    )

    payments = (
        pay_raw
        .withColumn("payment_id", F.col(p_id).cast("string"))
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("foreign_amount", num(p_amt))
        .withColumn("pay_ts", to_utc_ts(p_ts))
        .select("payment_id", "currency", "foreign_amount", "pay_ts")
    )

    # expectations: a payment is valid only if key/amount/time/ccy parse
    valid_pay = payments.where(
        F.col("payment_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("currency") != "")
        & F.col("foreign_amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("pay_ts").isNotNull()
    )

    # ---- read fx rates CDC ----
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)
    fc = fx_raw.columns
    f_ccy = detect_col(fc, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr"], what="fx currency")
    f_rate = detect_col(
        fc, ["rate", "fx_rate", "exchange_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd"], what="fx rate"
    )
    f_ts = detect_col(
        fc,
        ["effective_time", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "as_of", "rate_ts",
         "event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time"],
        what="fx timestamp",
    )
    f_op = detect_col(fc, ["op", "operation", "_change_type", "change_type", "cdc_op"],
                      required=False, what="cdc op")
    f_seq = detect_col(fc, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "lsn", "version", "_commit"],
                       required=False, what="cdc seq")

    rates = (
        fx_raw
        .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("rate", num(f_rate))
        .withColumn("rate_ts", to_utc_ts(f_ts))
    )

    # drop CDC deletes if an op column exists
    if f_op is not None:
        op = F.lower(F.col(f_op).cast("string"))
        rates = rates.where(~op.isin("delete", "d", "remove"))

    rates = rates.where(
        F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("currency") != "")
        & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
        & F.col("rate_ts").isNotNull()
    )

    # deterministic dedup of CDC duplicates for the SAME (currency, rate_ts) event
    seq_order = F.col(f_seq).cast("string").desc_nulls_last() if f_seq is not None else F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()
    wdedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_ts").orderBy(seq_order)
    rates_dedup = (
        rates.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wdedup))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
        .select("currency", "rate", "rate_ts")
    )

    # ---- as-of (point-in-time) join: latest rate with rate_ts <= pay_ts ----
    pj = valid_pay.alias("p")
    rj = rates_dedup.alias("r")
    joined = pj.join(
        rj,
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency")) & (F.col("r.rate_ts") <= F.col("p.pay_ts")),
        "left",
    )

    wasof = Window.partitionBy("p.payment_id").orderBy(
        F.col("r.rate_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("r.rate").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    enriched = (
        joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wasof))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
        .select(
            F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
            F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("p.foreign_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
            F.col("p.pay_ts").alias("payment_ts"),
            F.col("r.rate").alias("applied_rate"),
            F.col("r.rate_ts").alias("applied_rate_ts"),  # as-applied rate timestamp (audit)
        )
        .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("foreign_amount") * F.col("applied_rate"))
        .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("payment_ts")))
    )

    # gold: USD per UTC calendar day
    usd_daily = (
        enriched.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"), "usd_total")
    )

    return enriched, usd_daily


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("usd_daily_asof_fx")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    enriched, usd_daily = build(spark)

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T

# ---- default dataset locations (used when env vars are unset) ----
DEF_PAYMENTS = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
DEF_FX = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"


def get_spark():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("usd_daily_asof")
             .getOrCreate())
    # never trust the cluster default tz (spec deliberately leaves it unpinned)
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def to_utc_ts(c):
    """Normalize an event-time column (epoch sec/ms OR ISO string) to a UTC timestamp."""
    s = c.cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(s) >= F.lit(13), F.timestamp_millis(as_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(as_long))
    iso_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss[.SSS][XXX]"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(iso_ts)


def pick_key(keys, candidates):
    low = {k.lower(): k for k in keys}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for cand in candidates:               # fall back to substring match
        for k in keys:
            if cand in k.lower():
                return k
    return None


def map_col(keys, candidates, default=None):
    name = pick_key(keys, candidates)
    if name is None:
        return F.lit(default)
    return F.col("m")[name]


def read_as_map(spark, path):
    raw = spark.read.text(path)
    parsed = raw.withColumn(
        "m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), T.MapType(T.StringType(), T.StringType())))
    return parsed


def map_keys_of(parsed):
    rows = (parsed.where(F.col("m").isNotNull())
                  .select(F.explode(F.map_keys("m")).alias("k"))
                  .distinct().collect())
    return [r.k for r in rows]


def build_pipeline(spark):
    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEF_PAYMENTS)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", DEF_FX)

    # ---------- PAYMENTS ----------
    p_parsed = read_as_map(spark, payments_path)
    pk = map_keys_of(p_parsed)

    p_id = map_col(pk, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id", "event_id"])
    p_amt = map_col(pk, ["foreign_amount", "amount_foreign", "amount", "foreign_value",
                         "value", "fx_amount"])
    p_ccy = map_col(pk, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "from_currency", "code"])
    p_time = map_col(pk, ["event_time", "payment_time", "occurred_at", "paid_at",
                          "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at", "time"])
    p_seq = map_col(pk, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "version", "lsn", "_seq"], default=None)

    payments = (p_parsed
                .withColumn("payment_id", p_id.cast("string"))
                .withColumn("p_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(p_ccy.cast("string"))))
                .withColumn("amount_d", p_amt.cast("double"))
                .withColumn("pay_ts", to_utc_ts(p_time))
                .withColumn("p_seq", (p_seq.cast("long") if p_seq is not None else F.lit(0)))
                .withColumn("raw_value", F.col("value")))

    # ensure a stable business key even if payment_id is absent
    payments = payments.withColumn(
        "pk", F.coalesce(F.col("payment_id"),
                         F.concat_ws("|", F.col("p_ccy"), F.col("pay_ts").cast("string"),
                                     F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))))

    # expectations -> quarantine (observable loss, nothing dropped silently)
    bad_pay = (F.col("m").isNull() | F.col("amount_d").isNull() |
               F.col("p_ccy").isNull() | (F.length(F.col("p_ccy")) == 0) |
               F.col("pay_ts").isNull())
    pay_quarantine = payments.where(bad_pay).select(
        F.col("raw_value").alias("value"))
    pay_clean = payments.where(~bad_pay)

    # deterministic dedup of payments on business key
    pw = Window.partitionBy("pk").orderBy(
        F.col("p_seq").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("pay_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    pay_clean = (pay_clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(pw))
                          .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

    # ---------- FX RATES (CDC) ----------
    f_parsed = read_as_map(spark, fx_path)
    fk = map_keys_of(f_parsed)

    f_ccy = map_col(fk, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "from_currency", "code"])
    f_rate = map_col(fk, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "exchange_rate", "rate_to_usd",
                          "usd_per_unit", "price"])
    f_time = map_col(fk, ["effective_time", "valid_from", "rate_time", "event_time",
                          "as_of", "updated_at", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts", "time"])
    f_seq = map_col(fk, ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "version", "lsn", "_seq"], default=None)
    f_op = map_col(fk, ["op", "operation", "change_type", "_op", "cdc_op"], default=None)

    rates = (f_parsed
             .withColumn("r_ccy", F.upper(F.trim(f_ccy.cast("string"))))
             .withColumn("rate_d", f_rate.cast("double"))
             .withColumn("rate_ts", to_utc_ts(f_time))
             .withColumn("r_seq", (f_seq.cast("long") if f_seq is not None else F.lit(0)))
             .withColumn("r_op", (F.lower(f_op.cast("string")) if f_op is not None else F.lit(None))))

    bad_rate = (F.col("m").isNull() | F.col("rate_d").isNull() |
                F.col("r_ccy").isNull() | (F.length(F.col("r_ccy")) == 0) |
                F.col("rate_ts").isNull())
    rate_clean = rates.where(~bad_rate)

    # drop CDC deletes if an op column exists; keep everything otherwise
    rate_clean = rate_clean.where(
        ~F.coalesce(F.col("r_op").isin("d", "delete", "deleted"), F.lit(False)))

    # collapse CDC duplicates: latest sequence wins for a given (currency, rate_ts)
    rw = Window.partitionBy("r_ccy", "rate_ts").orderBy(F.col("r_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    rate_clean = (rate_clean.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(rw))
                            .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
                            .select("r_ccy", "rate_d", "rate_ts"))

    # ---------- AS-OF (point-in-time) JOIN ----------
    pay_sel = pay_clean.select("pk", "payment_id", "p_ccy", "amount_d", "pay_ts")
    cond = (pay_sel.p_ccy == rate_clean.r_ccy) & (rate_clean.rate_ts <= pay_sel.pay_ts)
    j = pay_sel.join(rate_clean, cond, "left")

    # latest eligible rate (<= payment time) wins -> never a future-stamped rate
    aw = Window.partitionBy("pk").orderBy(F.col("rate_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    enriched = (j.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(aw))
                 .where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn"))

    enriched = (enriched
                .withColumnRenamed("rate_ts", "rate_applied_ts")
                .withColumnRenamed("rate_d", "rate_applied")
                .withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount_d") * F.col("rate_applied"))
                .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(F.col("pay_ts")))
                .select(
                    F.col("payment_id"),
                    F.col("p_ccy").alias("currency"),
                    F.col("amount_d").alias("foreign_amount"),
                    F.col("pay_ts").alias("payment_ts"),
                    F.col("rate_applied"),
                    F.col("rate_applied_ts"),          # as-applied rate timestamp (audit)
                    F.col("usd_amount"),
                    F.col("settlement_date"),
                ))

    # payments with no in-effect rate cannot be converted without a future rate
    no_rate = enriched.where(F.col("rate_applied_ts").isNull())
    convertible = enriched.where(F.col("rate_applied_ts").isNotNull())

    # ---------- register intermediate contract tables as TEMP VIEWS ----------
    convertible.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_enriched")
    no_rate.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_no_rate_quarantine")
    pay_quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("payments_quarantine")

    # ---------- GOLD: usd_daily ----------
    usd_daily = (convertible
                 .groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                         F.col("usd_total"))
                 .orderBy("settlement_date"))
    usd_daily.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    return usd_daily


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv
    spark = get_spark()
    usd_daily = build_pipeline(spark)

    if analyze_only:
        # build & validate the plan without materializing anything
        _ = usd_daily.schema
        usd_daily.explain(mode="formatted")
        print("Plan is valid")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    if out_path:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        usd_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No output destination (AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH/AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE).")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

# ---- Fallback locations (used only if env vars are unset) -------------------
PAYMENTS_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"
OUTPUT_FALLBACK = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/new_scd2_as_of_join__A2__seed2718/usd_daily.parquet"


def find_col(df, candidates):
    """Case-insensitive resolution of the first matching column name."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def to_utc_ts(c):
    """Normalize a possibly-epoch / possibly-ISO timestamp string to a UTC timestamp."""
    s = c.cast("string")
    return (F.when(s.rlike("^[0-9]{13,}$"), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
             .when(s.rlike("^[0-9]{1,12}$"), F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
             .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s)))


def clean_number(c):
    """Strip quote/garbage wrappers and cast to double (garbage -> null)."""
    return F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), "[^0-9eE.\\-+]", "").cast("double")


def build_pipeline(spark, payments_path, fx_path):
    # ---------------- Read raw inputs --------------------------------------
    payments_raw = spark.read.json(payments_path)
    fx_raw = spark.read.json(fx_path)

    # ---------------- Resolve payment columns ------------------------------
    p_amount = find_col(payments_raw, ["amount", "payment_amount", "amt", "value", "amount_local"])
    p_ccy = find_col(payments_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"])
    p_ts = find_col(payments_raw, ["settlement_date", "event_time", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts",
                                   "payment_date", "paid_at", "date", "created_at", "booked_at"])
    p_id = find_col(payments_raw, ["payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id"])

    if p_amount is None or p_ccy is None or p_ts is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve payment columns from {payments_raw.columns}")

    pay = payments_raw
    pay = pay.withColumn("_pid",
                         F.col(p_id) if p_id else F.monotonically_increasing_id())
    pay = (pay
           .withColumn("amount", clean_number(F.col(p_amount)))
           .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(p_ccy).cast("string"))))
           .withColumn("settlement_date", F.to_date(to_utc_ts(F.col(p_ts))))
           .select("_pid", "amount", "currency", "settlement_date"))

    # ---------------- Resolve fx CDC columns -------------------------------
    f_ccy = find_col(fx_raw, ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr", "cur"])
    f_rate = find_col(fx_raw, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "usd_per_unit", "value"])
    f_eff = find_col(fx_raw, ["effective_date", "valid_from", "effective_from", "as_of_date",
                              "rate_date", "eff_date", "date"])
    f_know = find_col(fx_raw, ["recorded_at", "system_ts", "commit_ts", "change_ts", "ingested_at",
                               "updated_at", "knowledge_ts", "op_ts", "cdc_ts", "version_ts",
                               "loaded_at", "modified_at"])
    f_ver = find_col(fx_raw, ["version", "rate_version", "seq", "sequence", "revision", "_seq", "rev"])

    if f_ccy is None or f_rate is None or f_eff is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not resolve fx columns from {fx_raw.columns}")

    has_know = f_know is not None

    fx = fx_raw
    fx = (fx
          .withColumn("fx_currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(f_ccy).cast("string"))))
          .withColumn("rate", clean_number(F.col(f_rate)))
          .withColumn("eff_date", F.to_date(to_utc_ts(F.col(f_eff)))))

    if has_know:
        fx = fx.withColumn("know_date", F.to_date(to_utc_ts(F.col(f_know))))
    else:
        # No knowledge/system time available: cannot distinguish *when* a correction
        # was recorded, so fall back to the ORIGINAL version (never a later correction).
        fx = fx.withColumn("know_date", F.col("eff_date"))

    if f_ver is not None:
        fx = fx.withColumn("version", F.col(f_ver).cast("long"))
    else:
        fx = fx.withColumn("version", F.lit(None).cast("long"))

    fx = fx.select("fx_currency", "rate", "eff_date", "know_date", "version") \
           .where(F.col("eff_date").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    # ---------------- Bitemporal as-of join --------------------------------
    # Candidate rate records for a payment:
    #   * same currency
    #   * effective on/before the payment's own date (eff_date <= settlement_date)
    #   * KNOWN on/before the payment's own date (know_date <= settlement_date)
    #     -> this excludes corrections recorded AFTER the payment was booked.
    cond = (
        (pay.currency == fx.fx_currency)
        & (fx.eff_date <= pay.settlement_date)
        & (fx.know_date <= pay.settlement_date)
    )
    joined = pay.join(fx, cond, "left")

    if has_know:
        # Pick the rate in effect on that date: latest effective date, then the most
        # recent correction known as of the payment date, then highest version.
        order = [F.col("eff_date").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("know_date").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("version").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()]
    else:
        # No knowledge time: latest effective date, but the ORIGINAL (lowest) version
        # for that effective date -- i.e. not a later correction.
        order = [F.col("eff_date").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("version").asc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("rate").asc_nulls_last()]

    w = Window.partitionBy("_pid").orderBy(*order)
    ranked = (joined
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .drop("_rn"))

    # Effective rate: matched rate, or 1.0 for USD-denominated payments.
    ranked = ranked.withColumn(
        "eff_rate",
        F.when(F.col("rate").isNotNull(), F.col("rate"))
         .when(F.col("currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double")))

    # ---------------- Quarantine (observable loss, not silent drop) --------
    valid_pred = (
        F.col("amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("eff_rate").isNotNull()
    )
    quarantine = ranked.where(~valid_pred)
    clean = ranked.where(valid_pred)

    usd = clean.withColumn("usd_amount", F.col("amount") * F.col("eff_rate"))

    result = (usd.groupBy("settlement_date")
                 .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
                 .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date").alias("settlement_date"),
                         F.col("usd_total").cast("double").alias("usd_total")))

    return result, quarantine


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    payments_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", PAYMENTS_FALLBACK)
    fx_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
                             os.environ.get("FX_RATES_CDC_PATH", FX_FALLBACK))

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_scd2_as_of_join")
             .getOrCreate())
    # Deterministic UTC bucketing regardless of cluster default tz.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    result, quarantine = build_pipeline(spark, payments_path, fx_path)

    # Register contract-named temp view(s) in the same session.
    result.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily")
    quarantine.createOrReplaceTempView("usd_daily_quarantine")

    if analyze_only:
        # Build & validate the plan without materializing any output.
        result.printSchema()
        print("Plan analyzed; no output materialized.")
        spark.stop()
        sys.exit(0)

    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        result.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(OUTPUT_FALLBACK)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/tmp/sasa-a2rerun/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_a2_full/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson"

KEY_CANDS  = ["customer_id", "customerid", "cust_id", "id", "customer", "key"]
TIER_CANDS = ["tier"]
REGN_CANDS = ["region"]
SEQ_CANDS  = ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "change_seq", "version", "lsn",
              "op_seq", "_seq", "changeseq", "commit_seq"]
TIME_CANDS = ["event_ts", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "updated_at",
              "op_ts", "change_ts", "_ts", "modified_at", "time"]


def resolve_field(schema, names):
    """Return a Column for the first matching field (top-level, else nested struct)."""
    lower_top = {f.name.lower(): f.name for f in schema.fields}
    for n in names:
        if n in lower_top:
            return F.col("`%s`" % lower_top[n])
    cands = []
    for f in schema.fields:
        if isinstance(f.dataType, StructType):
            sub = {sf.name.lower(): sf.name for sf in f.dataType.fields}
            for n in names:
                if n in sub:
                    cands.append(F.col("`%s`.`%s`" % (f.name, sub[n])))
    if cands:
        return F.coalesce(*cands)
    return None


def norm_time(col):
    s = col.cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    return F.when(is_epoch, s.cast("double")) \
            .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(s)).cast("double"))


def clean(col):
    if col is None:
        return F.lit(None).cast("string")
    s = col.cast("string")
    t = F.trim(s)
    return F.when(t == "", None).otherwise(t)


def build_gold(spark, input_path):
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    print("=== INPUT SCHEMA ===")
    raw.printSchema()

    schema = raw.schema
    key_c  = resolve_field(schema, KEY_CANDS)
    tier_c = resolve_field(schema, TIER_CANDS)
    regn_c = resolve_field(schema, REGN_CANDS)
    seq_c  = resolve_field(schema, SEQ_CANDS)
    time_c = resolve_field(schema, TIME_CANDS)

    if key_c is None:
        raise ValueError("Could not resolve a customer_id key column. Columns: %s" % raw.columns)

    df = raw.withColumn("customer_id", key_c)
    df = df.withColumn("tier",   clean(tier_c))
    df = df.withColumn("region", clean(regn_c))

    # An upstream deletion is published as an EMPTY record: the keyed event
    # carries no real attribute values. Treat both-attributes-empty as a tombstone.
    df = df.withColumn("_is_delete", F.col("tier").isNull() & F.col("region").isNull())

    # Deterministic ordering: prefer an explicit CDC sequence/offset, then event time.
    order_exprs = []
    if seq_c is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_seq", seq_c.cast("double"))
        order_exprs.append(F.col("_ord_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    if time_c is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_ord_time", norm_time(time_c))
        order_exprs.append(F.col("_ord_time").desc_nulls_last())
    if not order_exprs:
        raise ValueError("No sequence/time ordering column found; cannot order CDC events deterministically.")

    # keep only keyed events
    df = df.where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(*order_exprs)
    latest = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    # If the latest event for a customer is a deletion -> remove (exclude).
    # Otherwise emit the surviving customer's latest real values.
    gold = (latest.where(~F.col("_is_delete"))
                  .select(
                      F.col("customer_id"),
                      F.col("tier").cast("string").alias("tier"),
                      F.col("region").cast("string").alias("region"),
                  ))
    return gold


def main():
    analyze_only = "--analyze-only" in sys.argv

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_cdc_tombstone")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    gold = build_gold(spark, input_path)

    # register the contract-named temp view in this session

        print("Plan is valid")

    print("=== GOLD SAMPLE ===")

    out_path  = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
